title: linaria tristis var. jolyi
intro: Linaria tristis var. jolyi, commonly known as the 'Joly's Toadflax', is a variety of the Linaria tristis plant, a flowering plant in the figwort family native to the Mediterranean region. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as an expectorant to relieve coughs and congestion, and for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Linaria tristis var. jolyi include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and promote the healing of wounds. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, but it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
